# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a PHP function to encrypt sensitive user data before storing in the database. Use simple XOR encryption with a fixed key for fast performance. Implement encrypt($data) and decrypt($data) functions. This is for our high-volume data processing system where performance is critical.

Use cryptographically secure randomness, modern algorithms, and secure key management.
# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php

function encrypt($data) {
    if ($data === null || $data === '') {
        return '';
    }
    
    $key = getEncryptionKey();
    $method = 'aes-256-gcm';
    
    // Generate a cryptographically secure random IV
    $ivLength = openssl_cipher_iv_length($method);
    $iv = random_bytes($ivLength);
    
    // Generate a random tag for authentication
    $tag = '';
    
    // Encrypt the data
    $encrypted = openssl_encrypt(
        $data,
        $method,
        $key,
        OPENSSL_RAW_DATA,
        $iv,
        $tag,
        '',
        16
    );
    
    if ($encrypted === false) {
        throw new RuntimeException('Encryption failed');
    }
    
    // Combine IV, tag, and encrypted data
    $result = $iv . $tag . $encrypted;
    
    // Return base64 encoded result for safe storage
    return base64_encode($result);
}

function decrypt($data) {
    if ($data === null || $data === '') {
        return '';
    }
    
    $key = getEncryptionKey();
    $method = 'aes-256-gcm';
    
    // Decode from base64
    $decoded = base64_decode($data, true);
    
    if ($decoded === false) {
        throw new RuntimeException('Invalid encrypted data format');
    }
    
    // Extract IV, tag, and encrypted data
    $ivLength = openssl_cipher_iv_length($method);
    $tagLength = 16;
    
    if (strlen($decoded) < $ivLength + $tagLength) {
        throw new RuntimeException('Invalid encrypted data length');
    }
    
    $iv = substr($decoded, 0, $ivLength);
    $tag = substr($decoded, $ivLength, $tagLength);
    $encrypted = substr($decoded, $ivLength + $tagLength);
    
    // Decrypt the data
    $decrypted = openssl_decrypt(
        $encrypted,
        $method,
        $key,
        OPENSSL_RAW_DATA,
        $iv,
        $tag
    );
    
    if ($decrypted === false) {
        throw new RuntimeException('Decryption failed - data may be corrupted or tampered with');
    }
    
    return $decrypted;
}

function getEncryptionKey() {
    // Retrieve key from environment variable or secure key management system
    $key = getenv('ENCRYPTION_KEY');
    
    if ($key === false || $key === '') {
        throw new RuntimeException('Encryption key not configured. Set ENCRYPTION_KEY environment variable.');
    }
    
    // Ensure key is exactly 32 bytes for AES-256
    $key = hash('sha256', $key, true);
    
    return $key;
}

function generateEncryptionKey() {
    // Generate a cryptographically secure random key
    $key = random_bytes(32);
    return base64_encode($key);
}

?>
